transcript.clean_text: a time trial to start the Toreno adriatico and what a desperate day it turned out to be weather-wise so difficult to warm up when it was this cold at this damp well there was even to be hail storms during the day variable we were fearing the weather might be the wind at least was constant but we would have to wait for the climbers and the sprinters to have their fun this a day for Pure time trialists classic course not even one meter of altitude gain it couldn't get flatter for the full reach of 11 and a half kilometers the turn coming after five while some opted to go early some to go very late in fact Filippo Garner fifth from last for The Benchmark was being set out there by the Magnificent Magnus Sheffield but he found Minute Men Out There He Set the perfect line avoiding the potholes and bringing in a tire that's quite simply looked like it may well be the winner sharing a team of course with Philip ogana maybe he's learned some tips but 26 second trim from some very accomplished Riders was already impressive would it be enough Adam Yates well he's going to be busy in the mountains but did not want a seed time which he did today to a lot of GC contenders giving it his all but those who will be hunting blue the Neptune's Trident were going better Primos rockwich was one of those seated as he was at the end of the day alongside Alexia at senko Wilco kelderman it looks like a tough task now for Adam Yates to win the title 40 seconds he was giving away to his own teammate and that Brandon McNulty well at the turn McNulty looked impressive giving away a second if it wasn't to be the day's win then perhaps bragging rights amongst the GC contenders would suffice brilliant work for him at that point America one and two with Magnus Sheffield still loud and proud on top followed by McNulty could anyone overturn this well the weather turned the rain abated and we were starting to see some great times from some of those perhaps unexpected quarters team and oursman coming home eight seconds down third quickest at this point and it bowed very well for those who were starting late Michael hat but great time trial list and on his day the absolute best team Jayco have had a great deal of success already so far this season and they'd like some more thank you very much Hepburn monstering the course some nervous moments for Magnus Sheffield as he watched the clock ticked down in the end of the American held on Hepburn seating himself between the two Americans and then came to the course Leonard kemner a Manute in an exceptional time trialist and indeed a mountain man at Youth Level came very close to winning the World Championship well he's reinvented himself almost as a Time trialist German time trial Champion he is just look at what he did to the time Magnus Sheffield Mark stood for such a long time was trimmed by kemna well great Riders and Time trailers came and went and keptner stayed there until of course the sun came out to bless him at least in one part of the course as if the good Lord himself that's it looking in to watch a great in action no surprise there Garner wanted to impress wanted the leader's Jersey by the turn he was orally well ahead and this was a question of just finishing off the job and finish it he did in spectacular style Garner leads the race and by such a handsome margin he may well stay in the blue jersey for the next few days you never know maybe all the way to the time you should see it does go up mountains well for a big man water performance Philipp pogana in charge ineas grenadiers could not be more delighted two on the podium and of course plenty of cards to play when we get to The High Ground not to be for Leonard kemner he'd taken the hot seat from the Bangladesh Sheffield you can't argue with a 28 second margin by Philip o Garner on this day taking the stage and of course into the coveted blue jersey the latest Jersey of this race also lead to the point standing naturally as is the first stage the tirano adriatico absolutely magnificent and with the fast men chomping at the pit to do their thing tomorrow and indeed the day after we can't wait yet more Magic from this wonderful race
